description.ko: 무한한 VOID-3 심연 위로 별먼지가 읽을 수 없는 우주의 문자를 이루는 고요한 장면.
description.en: A silent field of star dust forms unreadable cosmic script across the infinite VOID-3 abyss.

prompt: VOID-3 Cosmic Deep, an ultra-detailed deep space nebula where the infinite void appears as a colossal field of unreadable cosmic script stretched across darkness. Dense #E6E6FA star dust forms millions of tiny, suspended strokes and broken sigils, each grain drifting in very slow motion as if the universe is writing a warning too vast to read. Beneath the script, layered #0D0221 abyssal darkness opens in soft depth pockets that swallow distant stars without becoming a hole, portal, ring, vessel, or vortex. Wisps of #3D1A78 ultraviolet nebula vapor pass behind the glyph-like dust trails in transparent veils, while rare #7B68EE lavender plasma accents illuminate torn edges of the pattern like cold static. The composition should feel mysterious, solemn, and monumental: high particle density, restrained lavender glow, cold volumetric haze, infinite scale, astrophotographic texture, cosmic horror majesty, stars dust suspended in the silent deep universe.
